chunks.title: Laws on Guilt and Grain Offerings
chunks.reason: Defines the procedure for the guilt offering and specifies which parts of grain offerings belong to the priests.

chunks.title: Laws on Peace Offerings
chunks.reason: Details the types of peace offerings, consumption rules for thanksgiving and votive sacrifices, and purity requirements.

chunks.title: Laws on Fat and Blood
chunks.reason: Prohibits eating fat and blood from specific animals with the penalty of being cut off.

chunks.title: Priestly Portions
chunks.reason: Establishes the specific portions of the peace offerings designated for Aaron and his sons as a perpetual statute.

chunks.title: Summary of Laws at Sinai
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter by summarizing all preceding laws and anchoring them to the event at Mount Sinai.
